info.title: Gigabrain API
info.description: Programmatic access to The Brain and Gigabrain Agents.

tags.name: Brain
tags.description: Query The Brain for real-time crypto market intelligence

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create and manage autonomous trading agents

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Manage agent trading wallets on Hyperliquid

tags.name: Agent Chat & Monitoring
tags.description: Chat with agents and monitor execution history

tags.name: SuperAgents
tags.description: Launch, list, get, and destroy SuperAgents

tags.name: SuperAgent Config
tags.description: Update soul, model, profile, and skills configuration

post.description: Send a natural language query to The Brain. It routes to the right specialist(s) automatically. Add "Respond as JSON with:" to your message and specify fields to get structured JSON back.

value.message: Should I long or short ETH right now? Check technicals, funding, and macro. Respond as JSON with: direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit_1, take_profit_2, risk_reward_ratio, confidence, reasoning

Find tokens with extreme funding rates and crowded positioning that could squeeze. Respond as JSON array with: symbol, funding_rate, open_interest, long_short_ratio, squeeze_direction, liquidation_risk
What's the current macro risk regime for crypto? Factor in DXY, yields, VIX, and equities. Respond as JSON with: risk_regime, dxy_trend, vix_level, recommended_exposure, reasoning

504.description: Query timeout. Break into smaller, more specific requests.

post.description: Create a new trading agent. Costs $0.20 in credits. The agent is created disabled by default.

value.name: ETH Momentum Bot
value.goal: Monitor ETH/USDT and go long when RSI drops below 30 on the 4H chart
value.instructions: Use 4H timeframe. Enter long when RSI < 30 and funding is negative. Position size: 10% of wallet. Stop loss: 3% below entry. Take profit: 2:1 R:R minimum.

value.name: BTC Alpha Catcher
value.goal: React to high-impact BTC signals and take momentum trades
value.instructions: Only act on signals with impact rating 4+. Max 2 trades per day. Position size: 5% of wallet. Always set stop loss.

triggers.match: BTC momentum breakouts and trend reversals

get.description: List all agents owned by the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific agent including configuration, triggers, stats, and status.

patch.description: Update an agent's configuration. Only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Permanently delete an agent and all its data. **Export wallet keys and withdraw funds BEFORE deleting. This is irreversible.**

post.description: Start the agent. It will begin executing on its configured triggers. Trading agents require a wallet to be generated and activated first.
Stop the agent. All trigger-based execution pauses. Configuration and history are preserved.
Generate a Hyperliquid trading wallet for the agent. Returns the existing wallet if one has already been generated. Required before enabling a trading agent.

get.description: Get wallet details including address, chain, exchange, and status.

post.description: Activate the wallet for live trading. The wallet must be funded first. Returns an error with the deposit address if balance is insufficient.

200.description: Wallet activated (status will be "active" and agent_address will be populated)

post.description: Send funds from the agent's wallet to a destination address.
Send a message to an agent and get a response. Requires credits. With `stream: false` (default), returns a JSON object. With `stream: true`, returns an SSE stream of events.

get.description: Get execution history for a specific agent, including trigger type, status, output, and credits charged.

post.description: Get AI-generated trading strategy suggestions. Pass any market context, preferences, or constraints in the optional `context` object. Rate limited to 10 requests per hour.
Launch a new always-on SuperAgent. Each agent runs in its own cloud container with persistent memory and optional Telegram bot.

value.name: ETH Scalper
value.soul_md: You are an aggressive ETH scalper. Focus on 1m and 5m timeframes.

get.description: List all SuperAgents owned by the authenticated user.
Get full details of a specific SuperAgent.

403.description: Access denied — you don't own this agent

delete.description: Permanently destroy a SuperAgent and its container. **This is irreversible. Withdraw wallet funds first.**

post.description: Pause a running SuperAgent. The container stays alive but the agent stops processing.
Restart a SuperAgent's container. Useful after updating soul or model.
Send a message to a SuperAgent. Supports streaming via SSE. Each chat session is identified by a `session_id`.

example.content: I'm currently monitoring ETH/USDT on the 5m chart. Funding is slightly negative which favors longs. Waiting for RSI to dip below 35 for entry.

get.description: Check if a SuperAgent's container is healthy and responding.
Retrieve the agent's soul.md (identity) and memory.md (learned context).

memory_md.description: The agent's learned context and notes

example.soul_md: You are an aggressive ETH scalper. Focus on 1m and 5m timeframes.
example.memory_md:
## Trading Log
- 2026-03-15: Entered long ETH at $3,450, targeting $3,520

get.description: List all available skills for a SuperAgent, including enabled/disabled status.

put.description: Enable or disable specific skills. Pass a list of skill names to disable.

disabled.description: List of skill names to disable. Pass an empty array to enable all.

get.description: Get the SuperAgent's wallet address and status. No private keys are exposed.

put.description: Replace the agent's soul.md — its core identity and instructions.
Change the LLM model powering the agent.

model.description: Model ID from the selected provider

put.description: Update the agent's display name and/or description.

400.description: At least one of name or description is required

bearerAuth.description: Your Gigabrain API key. Get one at https://gigabrain.gg/profile?tab=api. Format: `gb_sk_...`

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests per minute)

message.description: Your query to The Brain. Add "Respond as JSON with:" and list fields for structured output.

model.description: Model ID from the provider's API. Use the exact ID the provider uses — e.g. "gpt-4o" for OpenAI, "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" for Anthropic, "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4" for OpenRouter. Requires a connected API key for the chosen provider.

model_provider.description: Provider of the custom model. Must match the provider you connected your API key for.

content.description: The response. Contains markdown by default, or parseable JSON if you requested it.

goal.description: Trading goal, e.g. "Monitor ETH/USDT and go long when RSI drops below 30"

instructions.description: Detailed strategy, behavior, and risk parameters

model.description: Model ID from the provider's API, or "default" for Gigabrain's default model. Use the exact ID the provider uses — e.g. "gpt-4o" for OpenAI, "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" for Anthropic, "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4" for OpenRouter. Requires a connected API key for the chosen provider.

model_provider.description: Provider of the custom model. Required when using a custom model ID.

AgentResponse.description: Agent summary returned in list endpoints

AgentDetailResponse.description: Full agent details returned by get/update endpoints

data.description: Full agent definition including goal, instructions, and configuration

cron.description: Cron expression (scheduled triggers only). Minimum 5 minutes. Supported: `*/5 * * * *`, `*/15 * * * *`, `0 * * * *`, `0 */4 * * *`, `0 0 * * *`

match.description: Vector-matched against incoming alpha signals (alpha triggers only)

min_impact_rating.description: Minimum impact rating to trigger (alpha triggers only). 1-2 = low, 3 = moderate, 4 = high, 5 = critical

message.description: Message to send to the agent
message.example: What positions are you currently monitoring?

session_id.description: Omit to start a new session

stream.description: Set to true for SSE streaming response

AgentChatResponse.description: Non-streaming response. For streaming, set stream: true to receive SSE events.

action_taken.description: Whether the agent executed a trade during this run

context.description: Free-form JSON object. Pass in any market context, preferences, or constraints you want. Gets sent to the AI strategy engine alongside your account.

soul_md.description: Custom soul.md content — the agent's identity and instructions

description.description: Short description of what the agent does

model.description: Model ID from the selected provider

telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram bot token (from @BotFather) for Telegram interface

bot_username.description: Telegram bot username (if token was provided)

SuperAgentWallet.description: Agent wallet addresses — no private keys are exposed
